sale_confirmed: E don enter. You sell {item} {quantity} {unit}, {currency} {total_amount}. Gain: {currency} {profit}. Stock: {remaining_stock} {unit}.
sale_low_stock_warning: E don enter. But {item} don dey finish — e remain {remaining_stock} {unit} only!
sale_out_of_stock: E don enter. But {item} don finish! Go buy more quick.
expense_confirmed: E don enter. {category}: {currency} {amount}. Total wey you spend today: {currency} {total_expenses_today}.
daily_summary: Today: You sell {currency} {total_revenue}, You buy {currency} {total_cost}, You spend {currency} {total_expenses}. Gain: {currency} {net_profit}. Transactions {transaction_count}. Wetin sell pass: {top_selling_item}.
daily_summary_comparison_up: Na better today! E pass yesterday {profit_change_pct}%!
weekly_report: This week: Total gain {currency} {total_profit}. Every day {currency} {avg_daily_profit}. Best day: {best_day}. Transactions {total_transactions}.
credit_profile: For the last {period_days} days: average daily revenue {currency} {avg_daily_revenue}, average daily profit {currency} {avg_daily_profit}, active days {active_days}, consistency score {consistency_score}. Risk level: {risk_level}.
clarify: I no understand well well. Abeg talk am again.
photo_unclear: I no fit read any clear transaction for that image. Abeg snap am again.
error: Something no work. Abeg try again.
welcome: Welcome to Susu Books! Press the green button, come tell me about your business.
